queries.question: For each streaming service, what are the corresponding content descriptions?
queries.sql: select streaming_service.name , content.description from Streaming_Service_Content join Content on Streaming_Service_Content.content_id = Content.content_id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Content.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?streaming_service_content a :Streaming_Service_Content .
  ?content a :Content .
  ?streaming_service_content p:hasContent ?content .
  ?streaming_service a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_service_content p:hasStreaming_Service ?streaming_service .
  ?streaming_service p:name ?name .
  ?content p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Give me the type, description and price of the content that we have for every streaming service
queries.sql: SELECT Content.type, Content.description, Content.price  from Streaming_Service_Content join Content on Streaming_Service_Content.content_id = Content.content_id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Content.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Content.content_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Content.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Service)

queries.question: what descriptions and prices are associated with each streaming service's content?
queries.sql: SELECT Content.description, Content.price  from Streaming_Service_Content join Content on Streaming_Service_Content.content_id = Content.content_id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Content.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Content.content_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Content.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Service)

queries.question: Provide the content description that is common for all streaming services.
queries.sql: SELECT Content.description  from Streaming_Service_Content join Content on Streaming_Service_Content.content_id = Content.content_id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Content.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Content.content_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Content.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Service)

queries.question: Give me the content types and prices for each streaming service.
queries.sql: SELECT Content.type, Content.price  from Streaming_Service_Content join Content on Streaming_Service_Content.content_id = Content.content_id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Content.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Content.content_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Content.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Service)

queries.question: What content do all streaming services equally offer?
queries.sql: SELECT Content.type  from Streaming_Service_Content join Content on Streaming_Service_Content.content_id = Content.content_id join Streaming_Service on Streaming_Service_Content.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Service.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Service_Content.content_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Service_Content.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Service)
